visualSystem.name: Una base, dos operadores
visualSystem.motif: Semantic maps, circuits, scales and chains; one archetype per argument.
visualSystem.themeContract: Light #FFFFFF and dark #111013; no decorative canvas, bubbles, gradients, glow or outer rounded frame.
visualSystem.responsiveContract: Desktop 1600x1080 and mobile 1200x1600 art direction at 860px.
visualSystem.brandSignature: All brand information is footer-only: official wordmark plus canonical efeoncepro.com bubble; no header wordmark.

assets.function: Show that a human and an authorized software agent converge on the same web infrastructure.
assets.notFunction: Not a real interface, product screenshot, autonomous-agent proof or theological claim.
assets.explanatoryDelta: Instala la tesis de una web compartida por una persona y un agente autorizado antes de entrar a la arquitectura.

deliveryContract.rationale: Un master gobernado alimenta featured, Open Graph y card; cada crop se revisa por anatomía, lectura cultural y foco.

metadata.alt: Una mano humana y una mano robótica se aproximan a una interfaz web compartida desde lados opuestos.
metadata.caption: La web deja de ser sólo una superficie: se convierte en un contrato común para personas y agentes autorizados.
metadata.description: Ilustración conceptual WAG-V01. No representa un producto, una interfaz real ni una capacidad autónoma.
metadata.disclosure: Conceptual generated illustration; not evidence or a real screenshot.

rights.provenance: Exploration began in conversational imagegen; selected master and final edits were produced through the canonical pnpm ai:image CLI with explicit gpt-image-2 and quality high. Prompts are stored verbatim in prompts/.
rights.culturalReference: Near-touching compositional tension associated with The Creation of Adam; no source image was used and no fresco, characters or religious iconography were reproduced.

findings: Conceptual interface must not be described as a real product.
Do not mirror the selected master; the robotic hand gesture must preserve radial/cubital orientation.
The active Ohio single-post template does not render the featured image inside the article hero; the asset is verified in archive cards, Open Graph, Twitter and schema primaryImage.

assets.context: Después de la taxonomía de tipos de sitio.
assets.function: Mostrar que disminuye la inferencia mientras aumentan operabilidad y gobierno.
assets.notFunction: No es una captura de producto, un estándar normativo ni una garantía de seguridad o interoperabilidad.
assets.explanatoryDelta: La transición decisiva no es “más IA”, sino una acción explícita, gobernada y demostrable.

deliveryContract.rationale: Art direction preserves readable hierarchy across desktop/mobile and native light/dark canvases while keeping the complete brand signature in the footer.
deliveryContract.brandSignature: All brand information is footer-only: official wordmark plus canonical efeoncepro.com bubble; no header wordmark.

metadata.caption: La transición decisiva no es “más IA”, sino una acción explícita, gobernada y demostrable.

rights.provenance: Deterministic SVG built locally; delivery text outlined with fontkit; no generated imagery or third-party assets.
